personal.name: Keertana P K
personal.title: Electronics Engineering Student | Data Analytics Enthusiast
personal.tagline: Transforming data and engineering concepts into impactful real-world solutions.
personal.bio: Final-year Electronics Engineering student at Ramaiah Institute of Technology with a strong focus on data analytics, intelligent systems, and applied engineering. Skilled in analyzing data, building machine learning models, and developing practical solutions that address real-world challenges.

about.title: About Me
sections: I am a final-year Electronics Engineering student with a strong interest in data analytics and intelligent systems. My academic journey has enabled me to build a solid foundation in both hardware and software domains.

I enjoy working with data to extract meaningful insights and develop solutions that combine analytical thinking with engineering principles. My work focuses on solving practical problems through structured and data-driven approaches.
I am actively seeking opportunities in data analytics, technology consulting, and intelligent system development where I can contribute effectively while continuously enhancing my technical skills.

experience.title: Intern – Design Thinking with AI (Low-Code/No-Code)
experience.description: Completed an internship focused on applying design thinking methodologies and AI-powered low-code/no-code tools to solve real-world problems. Gained experience in building solution prototypes and understanding modern digital product workflows.

projects.title: Smart IoT Home Monitoring System
projects.description: Developed a real-time monitoring system to track environmental parameters such as temperature and humidity using IoT sensors. Designed an interactive dashboard to visualize and interpret data effectively.

projects.title: Real-Time Network Intrusion Detection System
projects.description: Built a machine learning-based intrusion detection system to identify malicious network activity in IoT environments. Implemented real-time data processing and classification with a visualization interface.

projects.title: Smartphone Market Data Analysis
projects.description: Performed data cleaning, transformation, and exploratory analysis on smartphone datasets to extract insights related to pricing, ratings, and product features. Applied regression techniques for predictive analysis.

projects.title: Traffic Pattern Analysis
projects.description: Analyzed traffic datasets to identify congestion patterns and peak usage times. Demonstrated how data analytics can support smarter infrastructure planning.

certifications.name: Google Forage Certificate
certifications.description: Completed a virtual experience program involving real-world business problem solving and task-based learning.

certifications.name: Deloitte Forage Certificate
certifications.description: Completed a consulting-focused virtual internship involving data analysis and business case problem solving.

certifications.name: Infosys Springboard Certificate
certifications.description: Completed courses focused on digital technologies, professional skills, and industry-relevant concepts.

achievements.title: Research Paper – Compact Microstrip Patch Antenna
achievements.description: Authored a research paper on the design and simulation of a compact microstrip patch antenna, focusing on miniaturization techniques and performance analysis.

activities.title: National Service Scheme (NSS)
activities.description: Actively participated in community service initiatives including outreach programs, social awareness campaigns, and campus engagement activities.
